title: CLM Graphics
description: Designed a full suite of promotional and service graphics for an event center client, establishing a cohesive visual identity across all marketing materials.
keyContributions: Designed service graphics for an Event Center client

title: Page Creation Project (Client Web Optimization)
description: Supported client web optimization for car dealership websites by auditing page structure, responsive behavior, metadata accuracy, and content consistency across reusable dealer templates.
keyContributions: Updated assigned car dealership website content while preserving brand consistency and template structure
Audited media queries, map links, internal navigation, H1 tags, descriptions, and SEO metadata to strengthen page quality
Verified mobile responsiveness and layout consistency with simulator-based QA checks across dealer page templates
Replaced outdated imagery and validated visual placement to maintain polished, client-ready page presentations

title: Smart Verification System (SVS)
description: Contributed to the MDRRMO Smart Verification System — a platform for emergency dispatching and identity verification — through UI refinement, end-to-end testing, and a concept presentation deck.
keyContributions: Addressed styling issues in CSS and fine-tuned layout positioning to improve clarity and structure
Carried out end-to-end testing to uncover and resolve issues affecting user flow
Designed a PowerPoint deck to present the SVS concept and its process flow
Refined the interface by applying consistent spacing and alignment
Incorporated branding elements, contact hotlines, and other key information

title: DeskDine
description: Built and continuously refined the staff dashboard interface for a restaurant ordering system, focusing on operational efficiency, clear information hierarchy, and accessibility.
keyContributions: Built the staff dashboard layout and overall interface
Organized grid sections to emphasize the most critical order information
Continuously enhanced the UI using early feedback, focusing on better button access and clearer color contrast
Optimized the ordering flow to support faster and more efficient staff operations
